testcase.name: test_non_seeding_engines_exist

failure.message: AssertionError: At least some engines should not be seeding assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stats_row_acc30m.py:222: in test_non_seeding_engines_exist assert len(non_seeding) > 0, "At least some engines should not be seeding" E AssertionError: At least some engines should not be seeding E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_buy_sell_eligible_engines

failure.message: AssertionError: At least some engines should be eligible for trading assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stats_row_acc30m.py:232: in test_buy_sell_eligible_engines assert len(eligible) > 0, "At least some engines should be eligible for trading" E AssertionError: At least some engines should be eligible for trading E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_index_markets_closed_weekend
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_stats_row_acc30m.py:344: in test_index_markets_closed_weekend closed_indices = [m for m in market_hours if not m.get("is_open") and m.get("type") == "market"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_stats_row_acc30m.py:344: in <listcomp> closed_indices = [m for m in market_hours if not m.get("is_open") and m.get("type") == "market"] ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'
